name: Cross Country Transportation
principals: Fred Romano (listed owner per source data)
recent_news: No public news, web presence, or NJSBCA directory listing found as of 2026 search; minimal digital footprint.
fit_notes: Small Kearny, NJ school-bus operator (~40 employees, ~$1.9M revenue) with named owner; potential micro tuck-in for Summit's NJ footprint but minimal public information; direct outreach needed to confirm operator status, fleet, and contracts.

name: Bee Line Bus Trnsprtn LLC
recent_news: No specific Chandler-based 'Bee Line Bus Transportation LLC' confirmed at 2022 N Nevada St; not to be confused with the much larger Bee Line Transportation LLC (Tucson HQ, USDOT 2170139, 17 power units, Arizona's largest independent school bus contractor founded 1987 serving Phoenix/Tucson/Queen Creek/Casa Grande/Florence).
fit_notes: Chandler entity may be a small affiliate, virtual-office mailing address, or distinct micro-operator; name collision with Tucson-based Bee Line Transportation (privately owned, AZ's largest independent) creates ambiguity. Larger Bee Line could be a more meaningful AZ platform/tuck-in if not already owned, but the Chandler LLC at this address shows minimal independent footprint.

name: Intra-City Bus Corp
recent_news: No public web presence found; Ridgefield public school transportation is currently contracted to First Student (multi-year extensions, ~$500K savings per district report). Intra-City Bus Corp may be a small/legacy private-school or town shuttle contractor, or a defunct/dormant entity (PO Box only address).
fit_notes: PO Box mailing address and zero web footprint suggest a very small or potentially inactive operator; Ridgefield public schools are served by First Student. Limited fit as Summit tuck-in unless confirmed to hold private-school or special-needs routes; warrants phone outreach to confirm status.

name: School Bus Of Tech LLC
recent_news: No public web presence located. Nampa School District ended its 64-year contract with local family-owned Brown Bus Company and contracted with First Student in 2024 for the K-12 routes; School Bus Of Tech LLC may be tied to Nampa's iCAT Career & Technical Academy or a niche/CTE-related transport entity at the Hawaii Ave address.
fit_notes: Unverified independent operator; ambiguous name suggests possible tech-school transport niche rather than mainline school-bus contractor. Brown Bus Company (also Nampa) is the more material Idaho tuck-in candidate. Direct verification via Idaho SOS and on-site call needed before pursuing.

name: Pinks Bus Svc
principals: Beth Pinks Carton (President/Owner, daughter of founder)
districts_or_customers: Geneseo Community Unit School District (since 1948; 29 daily routes across 220 sq mi, ~1,750 student riders)
recent_news: 2022: celebrated 75th anniversary as continuous Geneseo CUSD contractor; founder George Pinks (d. 1982) replaced by daughter Beth Pinks Carton who declined buyout offers; son Erik Carlson now active in operations indicating ongoing family succession. BBB A+ accredited since 2008.
fit_notes: Classic Summit tuck-in profile: 80-year family-owned independent with single-district anchor contract (Geneseo CUSD), ~49 buses, ~50 employees, second-generation ownership with third-gen involvement suggesting medium-term succession opening. Diversified into auto/truck repair and charter. Strong fit for Summit's Midwest expansion.
